tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Eminem - Mockingbird
From the album: Encore (2004)
Comment for any corrections and please rate

Chords:  EADGBe    EADGBe
C/G      332010 or 335553
D/A      x00232 or 557775
Em       022000 or x79987
Em/B     x22000 or 779987


[tab][ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C/G[/ch]   [ch]D/A[/ch] [ch]Em/B[/ch]
     Yeah[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]C/G[/ch]                                [ch]D/A[/ch] [ch]Em/B[/ch]
I know sometimes things may not always make sense to you right now[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]                           [ch]C/G[/ch]
But hey, what daddy always tell you?[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D/A[/ch]              [ch]Em/B[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]C/G[/ch]
Straighten up little soldier, stiffen up that upper lip[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D/A[/ch]        [ch]Em/B[/ch]
What you crying about? You got me[/tab]

[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]                           [ch]C/G[/ch]
Hailie I know you miss your mom and I know you miss your dad[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D/A[/ch]                                 [ch]Em/B[/ch]
Well I'm gone but I'm trying to give you the life that I never had[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]                             [ch]C/G[/ch]
I can see you're sad, even when you smile, even when you laugh[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/A[/ch]                         [ch]Em/B[/ch]
I can see it in your eyes, deep inside you want to cry[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]                                  [ch]C/G[/ch]
Cause you're scared, I ain't there? Daddy's with you in your prayers[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D/A[/ch]                              [ch]Em/B[/ch]
No more crying, wipe them tears, daddy's here, no more nightmares[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]                                [ch]C/G[/ch]
We gon' pull together through it, we gon' do it'[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D/A[/ch]                         [ch]Em/B[/ch]
Laney uncles crazy, ain't he? Yeah but he loves you girl and you better know it[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]C/G[/ch]
We're all we got in this world when it spins, when it swirls[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D/A[/ch]                     [ch]Em/B[/ch]
When it whirls, when it twirls, two little beautiful girls[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]                             [ch]C/G[/ch]
Lookin' puzzled, in a daze, I know it's confusing you[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D/A[/ch]                         [ch]Em/B[/ch]
Daddy's always on the move, mama's always on the news[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                               [ch]C/G[/ch]
I try to keep you sheltered from it but somehow it seems[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D/A[/ch]                       [ch]Em/B[/ch]
The harder that I try to do that, the more it backfires on me[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]                          [ch]C/G[/ch]
All the things growing up his daddy that he had to see[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D/A[/ch]                           [ch]Em/B[/ch]
Daddy don't want you to see but you see just as much as he did[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                               [ch]C/G[/ch]
We did not plan it to be this way, your mother and me[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]D/A[/ch]                              [ch]Em/B[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
But things have gotten so bad between us I don't see us ever being together ever again[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C/G[/ch]                           [ch]D/A[/ch]
Like we used to be when we were teenagers[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em/B[/ch]                                      [ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]C/G[/ch]
But then of course everything always happens for a reason, I guess it was never meant to be[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]D/A[/ch]                          [ch]Em/B[/ch]
But it's just something we have no control over and that's what destiny is[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                               [ch]C/G[/ch]
 But no more worries, rest your head and go to sleep[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D/A[/ch]                                 [ch]Em/B[/ch]
Maybe one day we'll wake up and this will all just be a dream[/tab]

[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]C/G[/ch]
Now hush little baby, don't you cry[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D/A[/ch]               [ch]Em/B[/ch]
Everything's gonna be alright[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]C/G[/ch]
Stiffen that upper lip up little lady, I told ya[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]D/A[/ch]                 [ch]Em/B[/ch]
Daddy's here to hold ya through the night[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]C/G[/ch]
I know mommy's not here right now and we don't know why[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D/A[/ch]                [ch]Em/B[/ch]
We fear how we feel inside[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]C/G[/ch]
It may seem a little crazy, pretty baby[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D/A[/ch]               [ch]Em/B[/ch]
But I promise momma's gon' be alright[/tab]


It's funny
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                             [ch]C/G[/ch]
I remember back one year when daddy had no money[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D/A[/ch]                                   [ch]Em/B[/ch]
Mommy wrapped the Christmas presents up and stuck 'em under the tree [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]C/G[/ch]
And said some of 'em were from me, cause daddy couldn't buy 'em[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D/A[/ch]                           [ch]Em/B[/ch]
I'll never forget that Christmas I sat up the whole night crying[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]C/G[/ch]
Cause daddy felt like a bum, see daddy had a job[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D/A[/ch]                 [ch]Em/B[/ch]
But his job was to keep the food on the table for you and mom[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]C/G[/ch]
And at the time every house that we lived in[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]D/A[/ch]            [ch]Em/B[/ch]
Either kept getting broken into and robbed or shot up on the block [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]C/G[/ch]
And your mom was saving money for you in a jar[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D/A[/ch]                          [ch]Em/B[/ch]
Tryna start a piggy bank for you so you could go to college[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]C/G[/ch]
Almost had a thousand dollars till someone broke in and stole it[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D/A[/ch]                    [ch]Em/B[/ch]
And I know it hurt so bad it broke your momma's heart[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                               [ch]C/G[/ch]
And it seemed like everything was just startin' to fall apart[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D/A[/ch]                       [ch]Em/B[/ch]
Mom and dad was arguin' a lot so momma moved back[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]C/G[/ch]
On the Chalmers in the flat one bedroom apartment[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D/A[/ch]                         [ch]Em/B[/ch]
And dad moved back to the other side of 8 Mile on Novara[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]                           [ch]C/G[/ch]
And that's when daddy went to California with his CD [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D/A[/ch]              [ch]Em/B[/ch]
And met Dr. Dre and flew you and momma out to see me[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]C/G[/ch]
But daddy had to work, you and momma had to leave me[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D/A[/ch]                [ch]Em/B[/ch]
Then you started seeing daddy on the T.V.  [/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]C/G[/ch]
And momma didn't like it and you and Laney were to young to understand it[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D/A[/ch]                       [ch]Em/B[/ch]
Papa was a rollin' stone, momma developed a habit[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]C/G[/ch]
And it all happened too fast for either one of us to grab it[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/A[/ch]                       [ch]Em/B[/ch]
I'm just sorry you were there and had to witness it first hand[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]C/G[/ch]  
Cause all I ever wanted to do was just make you proud[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D/A[/ch]                    [ch]Em/B[/ch]
Now I'm sitting in this empty house, just reminiscing[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]C/G[/ch]
Lookin' at your baby pictures, it just trips me out[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D/A[/ch]                           [ch]Em/B[/ch]
To see how much you both have grown, it's almost like you're sisters now[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]C/G[/ch]                                 [ch]D/A[/ch]
 Wow, guess you pretty much are and daddy's still here[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em/B[/ch]
Laney I'm talkin' to you too, daddy's still here[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]C/G[/ch]                         [ch]D/A[/ch]
I like the sound of that, yeah, it's got a ring to it don't it?[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em/B[/ch]
Shh, momma's only gone for the moment[/tab]

[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]C/G[/ch]
Now hush little baby, don't you cry[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D/A[/ch]               [ch]Em/B[/ch]
Everything's gonna be alright[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]C/G[/ch]
Stiffen that upper lip up little lady, I told ya[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]D/A[/ch]                 [ch]Em/B[/ch]
Daddy's here to hold ya through the night[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]C/G[/ch]
I know mommy's not here right now and we don't know why[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D/A[/ch]                [ch]Em/B[/ch]
We fear how we feel inside[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]C/G[/ch]
It may seem a little crazy, pretty baby[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D/A[/ch]               [ch]Em/B[/ch]
But I promise momma's gon' be alright[/tab]

[tab]                       [ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]C/G[/ch]
And if you ask me too Daddy's gonna buy you a mockingbird[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/A[/ch]                 [ch]Em/B[/ch]
I'mma give you the world[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]C/G[/ch]
I'mma buy a diamond ring for you, I'mma sing for you[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D/A[/ch]                 [ch]Em/B[/ch]
I'll do anything for you to see you smile[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]C/G[/ch]
And if that mockingbird don't sing and that ring don't shine[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D/A[/ch]               [ch]Em/B[/ch]
I'mma break that birdies neck[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]C/G[/ch]
I'll go back to the jeweler who sold it to ya[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]D/A[/ch]                   [ch]Em/B[/ch]
And make him eat every carat don't fuck with dad (ha ha)[/tab]
